title: Craftable Enchanted Golden Apple│可合成附魔金蘋果
description: Added Enchanted Golden Apple recipe.│添加了附魔金蘋果配方。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
Place the golden apple in the middle and surround it with the nether star to craft the enchanted golden apple, which is like giving the magic power of the nether star to the golden apple. This recipe makes enchanted golden apples still rare, but feasible to produce in large quantities.│將金蘋果放在中間，下界之星圍繞在周圍即可合成附魔金蘋果，這就像將下界之星的魔力賦予到金蘋果上。這個配方使得附魔金蘋果依然很稀有，卻又能夠量產。

**※You can check the specific craft recipe in "Gallery"│你可以在"Gallery"中查看具體合成配方**
